attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT DD_CEC_ID,  'ACCESS_DENIED' SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR 
FROM
 $$SECURITYVWDB.MT_APSP_BCBD_SECURITY
GROUP BY 1

SEL distinct ST.DD_CEC_ID, APP_CMP.BK_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_NAME  FROM 
(SELECT BK_BCBD_MAILER_ALIAS_ADDR DD_CEC_ID, CMP_LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
FROM
 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_APSP_BCBD_MLR_IAM_AP_CMP_LNK  CMP_LNK
  INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_APSP_BCBD_USER SM
ON SM.BCBD_USER_KEY  = CMP_LNK.BCBD_USER_KEY  AND SM.BK_BCBD_USER_TYPE='MAILER ALIAS'
UNION
SELECT USR.DD_CEC_ID DD_CEC_ID, CMP_LNK.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
FROM
 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_APSP_BCBD_MLR_IAM_AP_CMP_LNK  CMP_LNK
  INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_APSP_BCBD_USER SM
ON SM.BCBD_USER_KEY  = CMP_LNK.BCBD_USER_KEY  AND SM.BK_BCBD_USER_TYPE='IAM USER'
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER USR
ON USR.IAM_USER_KEY=SM.IAM_USER_KEY  AND USR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
) ST
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT APP_CMP
ON APP_CMP.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY = ST.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
WHERE ST.DD_CEC_ID IS NOT NULL

UNION

    SEL DD_CEC_ID,  SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR||MIN_LEVEL  
FROM 
(sel DD_CEC_ID, SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR, MIN(TRIM(IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT))  MIN_LEVEL, FISCAL_YEAR FROM 
(SEL ST. DD_CEC_ID,  CASE PARAMETER_STATUS_FLG WHEN  'Y'  THEN 'CY'|| BK_PARAMETER_CD  
ELSE BK_PARAMETER_CD END
SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR,  IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, FISCAL_YEAR  FROM 
(select  DD_CEC_ID, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,  IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, bk_fiscal_year_num_int  fiscal_year from $$SECURITYVWDB.mt_apsp_bcbd_visibility  
UNION 
select  DD_CEC_ID,  trim(BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME) as BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 7 AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, bk_fiscal_year_num fiscal_year from 
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_APSP_BCBD_ERP_SLS_REP_LNK REP
inner join $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_APSP_BCBD_USER SM
on SM.BCBD_USER_KEY=REP.BCBD_USER_KEY  AND BK_BCBD_USER_TYPE='IAM USER'
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER USR
ON SM.IAM_USER_KEY=USR.IAM_USER_KEY)  ST  
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_BI_CAFE_AR_APP_CTRL_PARAMTR PARM
ON PARM.PARAMETER_DESCR=ST.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  
) TT    GROUP BY  DD_CEC_ID, SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR, fiscal_year ) TT
INNER  JOIN (SELECT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,  DV_PREVIOUS_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_YEAR WHERE  DV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG ='Y') FYEAR
ON  BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = FISCAL_YEAR

UNION

    SEL DD_CEC_ID,  SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR||MIN_LEVEL  
FROM 
(sel DD_CEC_ID, SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR, MIN(TRIM(IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT))  MIN_LEVEL, FISCAL_YEAR FROM 
(SEL ST. DD_CEC_ID,  CASE PARAMETER_STATUS_FLG WHEN  'Y'  THEN 'PY'|| BK_PARAMETER_CD  
ELSE BK_PARAMETER_CD END
SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR,  IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, FISCAL_YEAR  FROM 
(select  DD_CEC_ID, BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,  IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, bk_fiscal_year_num_int  fiscal_year from $$SECURITYVWDB.mt_apsp_bcbd_visibility  
UNION 
select  DD_CEC_ID,  trim(BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME) as BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, 7 AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT, bk_fiscal_year_num fiscal_year from 
$$SECURITYVWDB.N_APSP_BCBD_ERP_SLS_REP_LNK REP
inner join $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_APSP_BCBD_USER SM
on SM.BCBD_USER_KEY=REP.BCBD_USER_KEY  AND BK_BCBD_USER_TYPE='IAM USER'
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER USR
ON SM.IAM_USER_KEY=USR.IAM_USER_KEY)  ST  
INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_BI_CAFE_AR_APP_CTRL_PARAMTR PARM
ON PARM.PARAMETER_DESCR=ST.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME  
) TT    GROUP BY  DD_CEC_ID, SECURITY_COMPONENT_DESCR, fiscal_year ) TT
INNER  JOIN (SELECT BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,  DV_PREVIOUS_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_YEAR WHERE  DV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR_FLAG ='Y') FYEAR
ON DV_PREVIOUS_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER = FISCAL_YEAR
